decoded: Life is tough, and if you have the ability to laugh at it you have the ability to enjoy it. (Salma Hayek)
Courage is what it takes to stand up and speak. Courage is also what it takes to sit down and listen. (W. Churchill)
Success is never final. Failure is never fatal. It is courage that counts. (John Wooden)
Education is like a double-edged sword. It may be turned to dangerous uses if it is not properly handled. (Wu Ting-Fang)
Love is friendship, set on fire. (Jeremy Taylor)
Love is composed of a single soul inhabiting two bodies. (Aristotle)
True friends stab you in the front. (Oscar Wilde)
Love is friendship, set on fire. (Jeremy Taylor)
Women marry men hoping they will change. Men marry women hoping they will not. So each is inevitably disappointed. (Albert Einstein)
True friends stab you in the front. (Oscar Wilde)
Courage does not always roar. Sometimes courage is the little voice at the end of the day that says :I will try again tomorrow. (Mary Anne Radmacher)
Love is friendship, set on fire. (Jeremy Taylor)
Your friend is the man who knows all about you and still likes you. (Elbert Hubbard)
Love is friendship, set on fire. (Jeremy Taylor)
I think the next best thing to solving a problem is finding some humor in it. (F.H. Clark)
